headline: The youngest-ever female CEO of a Fortune 500 company is fighting Trump’s cuts to keep Medicaid strong
summary: Centene CEO Sarah London is using AI, predictive algorithms, and affordable housing to prove government-sponsored health care can deliver strong results.
